description: Resident FPGA↔IDE I/O channel. Self-identifying media channel: every packet carries a 4-byte ASCII FourCC type tag (open registry—add tags without changing dispatch code). Register replaces the hardwired B:02½ call-home boot step. Call(GT) forwards through the tunnel to a remote capability (the ‘Hello Mum’ primitive).

methods.name: Register
methods.description: Send the call-home identification packet and await ACK from the IDE bridge. Replaces the hardwired B:02½ boot step. Packet: [boot_reason · last_fault · fault_NIA]. Offline-safe: DR0 ≤ 0 if no ACK.
outputs: DR0: 1 = IDE connected and ACK received | ≤0 = offline
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT from c-list slot 0 → CR7
DWRITE DR1, CR7[0]       ; TX: boot_reason
DWRITE DR2, CR7[0]       ; TX: last_fault
DWRITE DR3, CR7[0]       ; TX: fault_NIA
DREAD  DR0, CR7[1]       ; RX: IDE ACK (1=connected, ≤0=offline)
RETURN AL, CR5

methods.name: Send
methods.description: Transmit a self-identifying FourCC media packet to the IDE. Tag is open registry—TEXT/VOIC/LUMP/GTKN/JPEG/PDF_/MP3_/… Fire-and-forget.
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT → CR7
DWRITE DR1, CR7[0]       ; TX: FourCC tag word
DWRITE DR2, CR7[0]       ; TX: payload word count
DWRITE DR3, CR7[0]       ; TX: first payload word
DREAD  DR0, CR7[0]       ; TX queue status (0=OK, 1=overrun)
RETURN AL, CR5

methods.name: Receive
methods.description: Block until the IDE sends a self-identifying media packet or timeout expires. Caller dispatches on the returned FourCC tag.
inputs: DR1: timeout in CPU steps (0 = wait forever)
outputs: DR1: FourCC type tag (TEXT · VOIC · LUMP · GTKN · …)
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT → CR7
DWRITE DR1, CR7[0]       ; TX: timeout hint
DREAD  DR0, CR7[1]       ; RX: word count (0=timeout)
DREAD  DR1, CR7[1]       ; RX: FourCC tag
DREAD  DR2, CR7[1]       ; RX: first payload word
RETURN AL, CR5

methods.name: Fault
methods.description: Report a hardware fault with full semantic location to the IDE. High-priority: bypasses the normal send queue. Packet: [fault_code · ns_idx · thread_gt · abstr_idx · method_idx · instr_offset].
inputs: DR3: thread_gt — NS index of the faulting thread
DR4: abstr_idx — NS slot of the executing abstraction
DR5: method_idx — method index within the abstraction
DR6: instr_offset — instruction offset within the method
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT → CR7
DWRITE DR1, CR7[0]       ; TX: fault_code
DWRITE DR2, CR7[0]       ; TX: ns_idx
DWRITE DR3, CR7[0]       ; TX: thread_gt
DWRITE DR4, CR7[0]       ; TX: abstr_idx
DWRITE DR5, CR7[0]       ; TX: method_idx
DWRITE DR6, CR7[0]       ; TX: instr_offset
DREAD  DR0, CR7[0]       ; TX queue status → DR0
RETURN AL, CR5

methods.name: Fetch
methods.description: Request and receive a lump binary from the IDE by NS slot token. Validates before installing. Called by Loader on NULL_CAP fault for a cold slot.
inputs: DR1: NS slot token (identifies the requested abstraction)
DR2: expected lump size in words
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT → CR7
DWRITE DR1, CR7[0]       ; TX: slot token request
DWRITE DR2, CR7[0]       ; TX: expected word count
DREAD  DR0, CR7[1]       ; RX: 0=installed, non-zero=error
RETURN AL, CR5

methods.name: Call
methods.description: Forward a CALL through the tunnel to a remote capability. The ‘Hello Mum’ primitive: CALL(CONNECT(me, mymother)). Encodes CR2 as a GTKN packet, transmits it, blocks awaiting far-end RETURN.
inputs: CR2: remote GT (Outform type, F-bit set — far-end abstraction)
outputs: DR0: far-end return value | non-zero = error / timeout
comments: LOAD  AL, CR7, CR6[0]   ; UART GT → CR7
TPERM AL, CR2, #E        ; restrict remote GT to E-only before CALL
CALL  AL, CR2, CR2       ; invoke remote abstraction via tunnel
DREAD  DR0, CR7[1]       ; RX: far-end return value
RETURN AL, CR5
